author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: The giant panda possesses a unique 'pseudo-thumb' (an enlarged wrist bone) that helps it grip and strip bamboo stalks.
giant panda cubs are born extremely small, weighing only about 4 ounces—roughly the size of a stick of butter.
